rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL et al VS. DARREN LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion By Defendants Valerie Lee And Darren Lee To Permit Additional Briefing Accompanying Papers: Memorandumof Points And Authorities; Declaration Of John C. Brown
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 24, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANTs DARREN LEE, VALERIE LEE, and 3073-3075 CLAY STREET LLC's Motion To Permit Additional Briefing Accompanying Papers: Memorandum of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of John C. Brown DENIED. Request to file a rebuttal/sur-reply is DENIED. Request to file an oversized opposition brief is DENIED. However, Defendant is permitted to (1) omit the required "Introduction" section and (2) not repeat the facts listed in the Plaintiff's "Facts" section as to those facts that are not in dispute, e.g. date of filing of the action, date of injunction, etc. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE RAYMOND SCOTT ET AL VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, NA. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. To Dismiss Action With Prejudice
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 24, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Dismiss Action With Prejudice transferred to department 302 to be heard on October 4, 2018 at 9:30 a.m. Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to Amend will also be heard in Department 302 on October 4, 2018 at 9:30 a.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: POSEE CHUNG VS. RICK QURESHI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 24, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT RICK QURESHI's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint states a cause of action against the moving defendant. This was a limited jurisdiction matter at the time of filing. Any party may move to reclassify the matter to unlimited in light of the passage of time and accrual of holdover damages. This however, is not a proper basis for demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 24, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT SYDNEY HODGKINSON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR, case settled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER SIOSON VS. SHARON FERNALD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 24, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANTs SHARON FERNALD and JESSE DAVIS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege the exemption as stated in her opposition at page 2: 14-18. = (501/REQ)
